Ties directly to the Green Spoon / Acosta / Pinnacle / Crossmark broker conversations.

_coverage: Weeks swept — ALL FIVE CONFIRMED: (1) 6/11-6/17 OK (2) 6/18-6/24 OK incl. UNFI East Holiday & Winter Selling Show, Mohegan Sun (setup 6/23, show 6/24-6/25) (3) 6/25-7/1 OK incl. Summer Fancy Food Show, Javits, 6/28-6/30, Cotto at Startup CPG booth 4508A (4) 7/2-7/8 OK (5) 7/9-7/17 OK. Method: primary broad query (samples/sell sheet/wholesale/case pack/SRP/new item/category review/buyer/merchant/forager/distributor/retailer/shelf/stores/reorder/fancy food/great meeting/great connecting/follow up) after:2026/06/10 paginated to EXHAUSTION — all 14 pages, ~660 thread-results, until nextPageToken was absent. Supplemented with: in:sent sweep (2 pages); bounded 6/11-6/18 in:sent sweep (2 pages); retail/distributor domain sweep (from:/to: unfi.com, kehe.com, wholefoods.com, amazon.com, rainforestdistribution.com — exhausted at 2 pages); and a mechanics sweep (line review / reset / review window / new item form / item submission / category manager / broker / buying group / co-op / DSD). ~30 threads opened via get_thread for full or minimal body reads rather than relying on snippets.
_notes_bounces: ALL BOUNCES VERIFIED AGAINST ACTUAL NDR MESSAGES, NOT INFERRED. (1) CITARELLA — all three attempts hard-bounced: kbausa@citarella.com, Kristen.bausa@citarella.com, kristen@citarella.com ('Address not found'; one SMTP 550). ROOT CAUSE per Steve Ioannou (Meraki): Citarella's mail server only accepts pre-approved senders — guessing further permutations will NOT work. Route via Meraki's buyer 'Ray' or drop samples physically (Kendall's stated plan: Bronx drop). (2) THE FRESH MARKET — brittiany.east@thefreshmarket.net failed TWICE, two different causes: postmaster 'The email address you entered couldn't be found' AND a Google 'Message too large ... exceeds the size limit'. WORKING address is brittianyeast@thefreshmarket.net (no dot); keep attachments small. (3) SPROUTS — nicolelambeck@sprouts.com 'permanent fatal errors' (pphosted NDR); jeffreynachreiner@sprouts.com shows no NDR and appears valid. (4) GREENS NATURAL — airizarry@greensnatural.com forwarding failure; nguerrero@greensnatural.com appears delivered. (5) AMAZON/WFM — Gilbrook@amazon.com bounced (Kendall's own typo, self-corrected same minute to the valid Gilbrooke@amazon.com). NOT bounces but ADDRESS MIGRATIONS: john.lawson@wholefoods.com auto-replies 'no longer actively monitoring this WFM email' → use johnxlaw@amazon.com; Amy Mescal exists at both amy.mescal@wholefoods.com and mescalaa@amazon.com; Nicole West at both nicole.west@wholefoods.com and nicmwest@amazon.com.
_notes_hottest: HIGHEST-VALUE THREADS: Raley's (buyer-level intro to Category Manager Matt Osburn + Dir Fresh Prod Optimization Kaeley Latow, with regional exclusivity floated BY THE RETAILER, unprompted); AWG (product loved, escalated to Sr. Category Manager, blocked ONLY on the broker question); Wakefern/ShopRite (in-person line review at Keasbey HQ offered — Kendall countered virtual, worth reconsidering); Earth Fare (New Item Form in hand, samples delivered, buyer was about to reach out unprompted); Walmart Canada (Sr. Merchant Dairy, fully inbound, meeting 7/20); Giant Food (cost sheet submitted in their own workbook, escalated analyst→category manager in 13 days); Kings/Balducci's (buyer: 'looking forward to seeing your product on shelves'); Winn-Dixie via UNFI (samples in for the live Cultured reset review).
_notes_review_windows: CONCRETE REVIEW WINDOWS CAPTURED: Whole Foods DIPS (DAIRY) — July 2026 application window → MARCH 2027 RESET; app deadline 7/9, submitted 7/7 (confirmation from Suppliers@wholefoods.com). The Fresh Market — set NOT currently under review; Devin Stanley offered to add Cotto to the category review notification email (he returns from vacation 7/20). Winn-Dixie — Cultured reset review, LIVE NOW, samples shipped 7/16. Wakefern/ShopRite — line review at Keasbey HQ; call targeted early August (Cittadino OOO end of July).
